zh-CN.title: CopyShelf 发布：懂内容格式与目标应用的 macOS 智能剪贴板
zh-CN.description: 传统的剪贴板工具只管记录历史。CopyShelf 专为 macOS 打造，不仅完美承袭了基础剪贴板功能，更在 Markdown 与 Apple Notes 富文本互转、多语言 RTL 文本修正、目标应用自动格式适配上提供无感体验。
zh-CN.content:
TL;DR: 传统的剪贴板工具主要解决“历史记录”和“快速取回”的问题，但对“内容格式理解”、“目标应用适配”和“多语言排版兼容”的支持较弱。CopyShelf 是一款专为 macOS 打造的智能剪贴板管理工具。它不仅能保存和调用复制历史，还能理解内容格式、判断目标输入场景，并以最合适的形式完成粘贴与转换。

🚀 访问官方网站体验：copyshelf.rbbtsn0w.me

在日常开发、内容创作与跨应用协作中，我们频繁地在不同的应用之间进行“复制、切换、再粘贴”的操作。然而，我们经常遇到以下尴尬的情况：

  1. Markdown 与富文本的格式丢失：从 Markdown 编辑器复制一段排版，粘贴到 Apple Notes（备忘录）时只剩下一堆无意义的原始符号或纯文本；或者反过来，从 Apple Notes 复制的格式粘贴到 .md 文件时乱成一团。
  2. 多语言排版混乱：在处理阿拉伯语、希伯来语等 RTL（Right-to-Left，从右至左）文本时，一旦混排了英文、数字或标点，方向便会错乱、标点符号错位。
  3. 机械的手动格式转换：每次粘贴都需要人手动介入清洗格式，降低了整体的工作效率。

CopyShelf 的诞生正是为了解决这些高频却一直被忽视的剪贴板痛点。

🛠️ CopyShelf 的核心功能与差异化

1. Markdown 与 Apple Notes 智能双向转换

在 Markdown 与 Apple Notes 富文本之间提供高频、低心智负担的双向转换体验。

  • 当您在 Markdown 环境（如 VS Code、Obsidian）复制内容并切换到 Apple Notes 粘贴时，CopyShelf 会智能输出 Notes 可识别的标题、列表、粗体与链接排版。
  • 当您从 Apple Notes 复制富文本内容粘贴到 .md 编辑器时，CopyShelf 会自动将其转换并输出为规范的 Markdown 语法。

2. 目标应用与场景感知 (App & Context Aware)

CopyShelf 会自动判断您当前处于哪种输入场景：

  • 在 Markdown 编辑场景下，它自动优先输出 Markdown 文本。
  • 在富文本编辑场景下，它自动优先输出 富文本样式。
  • 您完全不需要每次都手动切换格式，系统会“自动理解并一键确认”。对于特殊情况，您也可以通过快捷键手动指定粘贴模式。

3. RTL 文本方向修正与混排优化

面向多语言用户，CopyShelf 提供了阿拉伯语、希伯来语等 RTL 文本的方向修正与顺序适配。彻底解决中英与中东语言混排时，标点错位、数字混乱的显示顽疾。

4. 毫不妥协的剪贴板基础能力

CopyShelf 完美对齐并优化了主流 macOS 剪贴板工具（如 Pastebot）的核心体验，确保日常使用的绝对稳定：

  • 最近历史与搜索：轻量快捷，支持按文本、富文本、链接、图片等多种数据类型检索。
  • 常用条目固定 (Pinned Lists)：支持分类管理您的常用文本片段或常用集合。
  • Quick Paste Menu：通过全局快捷键迅速唤起浮窗，回车或双击即可实现粘贴。
  • 隐私黑名单：智能忽略来自 1Password、Keychain 等密码管理器的复制历史，保护敏感数据安全。

💎 技术实现：纯原生与 Swift 6

为了实现极致的系统级交互与性能，CopyShelf 在架构设计上有着严格的要求：

  • 系统环境：原生支持 macOS 14.0+，基于最新的 Swift 6 语言特性构建。
  • 极速响应：完全抛弃了笨重的 Web 套壳（Electron），采用原生的 macOS 系统框架，确保毫秒级的唤起与检索速度，且在后台运行时内存占用极小。
  • 安全性：所有剪贴板记录均安全地保存在本地沙盒，绝不在未经用户授权的情况下上传敏感的剪贴内容。

🚀 马上体验

CopyShelf 基础版已完成核心能力的对齐，欢迎访问官方网站下载体验：

👉 官方网站：copyshelf.rbbtsn0w.me

如果您在使用过程中有任何问题、或是希望加入新的格式转换类型，欢迎在我的 Github 上留下反馈！

en.title: CopyShelf Releases: A Smart Clipboard for macOS That Understands Content Formatting and Target Applications
en.description: Traditional clipboard tools only record history. CopyShelf, designed specifically for macOS, not only perfectly inherits the basic clipboard functionality, but also provides a seamless experience in Markdown and Apple Notes rich text conversion, multilingual RTL text correction, and automatic format adaptation for target applications.
en.content:
TL;DRTraditional clipboard tools primarily address the issues of "history" and "quick retrieval," but their support for "content format understanding," "target application adaptation," and "multilingual typesetting compatibility" is relatively weak.CopyShelfIt's a smart clipboard management tool designed specifically for macOS. It not only saves and retrieves copy history, but also understands content format, determines the target input scenario, and completes pasting and conversion in the most appropriate way.

🚀 Visit the official website to experience it:copyshelf.rbbtsn0w.me

In daily development, content creation, and cross-application collaboration, we frequently perform "copy, switch, and paste" operations between different applications. However, we often encounter the following awkward situations:

  1. Markdown and rich text formatting lossCopying formatted text from a Markdown editor and pasting it into Apple Notes results in nothing more than a bunch of meaningless raw symbols or plain text; or vice versa, copying formatted text from Apple Notes and pasting it into....mdThe documents were a complete mess.
  2. Multilingual layout disorderWhen processing RTL (Right-to-Left) text such as Arabic and Hebrew, the direction will be disordered and the punctuation marks will be misaligned if English, numbers, or punctuation are mixed in.
  3. Manual format conversion by machineEach time the formatting is pasted, manual intervention is required to clean it up, which reduces overall work efficiency.

CopyShelfThe creation of clipboard was precisely to solve these high-frequency but long-overlooked pain points of the clipboard.

🛠️ CopyShelf's core features and differentiators

1. Intelligent bidirectional conversion between Markdown and Apple Notes

Provides a high-frequency, low-mental-burden bidirectional conversion experience between Markdown and Apple Notes rich text.

  • When you copy content in a Markdown environment (such as VS Code or Obsidian) and switch to Apple Notes to paste, CopyShelf will intelligently output headings, lists, bold text, and links that Notes can recognize.
  • When you copy rich text content from Apple Notes and paste it into....mdWhen editing, CopyShelf will automatically convert and output it as standard Markdown syntax.

2. Target Application and Context Aware

CopyShelf will automatically determine your current input scenario:

  • In Markdown editing scenarios, it automatically prioritizes output.Markdown text。
  • In rich text editing scenarios, it automatically prioritizes output.Rich text styles。
  • You don't need to manually switch formats every time; the system will "automatically understand and confirm with one click." For special cases, you can also manually specify the paste mode using a keyboard shortcut.

3. RTL Text Direction Correction and Blending Optimization

For multilingual users, CopyShelf offers direction correction and sequence adaptation for RTL text in languages ​​such as Arabic and Hebrew. It completely solves the persistent problems of misaligned punctuation and disordered numbers when Chinese, English, and Middle Eastern languages ​​are mixed.

4. Uncompromising clipboard capabilities

CopyShelf perfectly aligns with and optimizes the core experience of mainstream macOS clipboard tools (such as Pastebot), ensuring absolute stability for everyday use:

  • Recent History and SearchLightweight and fast, it supports searching by various data types such as text, rich text, links, and images.
  • Pinned Lists (Frequently Used Items)It supports categorizing and managing your frequently used text snippets or collections.
  • Quick Paste Menu: Quickly bring up the floating window using the global shortcut key, and then press Enter or double-click to paste.
  • Privacy blacklistIt intelligently ignores copy history from password managers such as 1Password and Keychain, protecting the security of sensitive data.

💎 Technical Implementation: Pure Native and Swift 6

To achieve optimal system-level interaction and performance, CopyShelf has strict requirements in its architectural design:

  • System EnvironmentNatively supports macOS 14.0+, based on the latest...Swift 6Language feature construction.
  • Ultra-fast responseIt completely abandons the cumbersome web shell (Electron) and adopts the native macOS system framework, ensuring millisecond-level wake-up and retrieval speeds, and minimal memory usage when running in the background.
  • SecurityAll clipboard records are securely stored in a local sandbox, and sensitive clipboard content is never uploaded without user authorization.

🚀 Experience it now!

CopyShelf Basic Edition has completed the alignment of its core capabilities. Welcome to visit the official website to download and experience it:

👉 Official website: copyshelf.rbbtsn0w.me

If you encounter any problems while using it, or if you would like to add new format conversion types, please feel free to leave feedback on my Github!
